is a [Namibian football](/wiki/Football_in_Namibia "Football in Namibia") club. It is based in the Namibian capital [Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"), and play in the country's top league, the [Namibia Premier Football League](/wiki/Namibia_Premier_Football_League "Namibia Premier Football League"). In the 1990s, they were sponsored by [Mukorob Pelagic](/w/index.php?title=Mukorob_Pelagic&action=edit&redlink=1 "Mukorob Pelagic (page does not exist)") and referred to as the MP Tigers.

**Tigers Sports Club** is a [Namibian football](/wiki/Football_in_Namibia "Football in Namibia") club. It is based in the Namibian capital [Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"), and play in the country's top league, the [Namibia Premier Football League](/wiki/Namibia_Premier_Football_League "Namibia Premier Football League"). In the 1990s, they were sponsored by [Mukorob Pelagic](/w/index.php?title=Mukorob_Pelagic&action=edit&redlink=1 "Mukorob Pelagic (page does not exist)") and referred to as the MP Tigers.

## Achievements

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=United_Africa_Tigers&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Achievements")]

* **[Namibia Premier League](/wiki/Namibia_Premier_League "Namibia Premier League")**
  + Champions (2): 1985, 2015–16
* **[NFA-Cup](/wiki/NFA-Cup "NFA-Cup")**
  + Winners (3): 1995, 1996, 2015
